title: CCNA 200-301: The Complete Guide to Getting Certified
highlights: OSI/TCP-IP models, IP addressing, subnetting, VLANs, Ethernet switching, and wireless LANs
Routing protocols: OSPF, EIGRP, RIP; NAT, ACLs, DHCP, and WAN technologies
Security fundamentals: access control lists, port security, AAA, and threat identification
Network automation and programmability: REST APIs and configuration management concepts

title: Introduction to Software Testing
highlights: Test design fundamentals: fixtures, test cases, test oracles, and fault identification
White-box and black-box testing with statement and branch coverage analysis
Automated testing tool implementation and comprehensive test suite execution
Test case quality assessment with input validation and expected outcome verification

title: Networking Essentials
highlights: Network architecture: OSI/TCP-IP layering, component types, and communication principles
IPv4/IPv6 addressing, DHCP, TCP/UDP protocols, routing, and network segmentation
Ethernet switching, wireless networking, and LAN access technologies
Basic device management, CLI operations, and network design fundamentals

title: NDG Linux Essentials
highlights: Linux OS architecture, distributions, and command-line interface fundamentals
File system navigation, permissions management, and user account administration
Software installation, package management, and system configuration
LPI Linux Essentials certification exam preparation

title: NDG Linux Unhatched
highlights: Linux installation, system configuration, and command-line interface introduction
Core commands for file operations, directory navigation, and system information retrieval
Introduction to shell operations, input/output redirection, and basic scripting concepts

title: Hands-on Introduction to Linux Commands & Shell Scripting
highlights: Linux architecture, distributions, software installation, and package management
Essential Bash commands: file operations, navigation, compression, and content filtering
Shell script development with variables, pipes, filters, and control flow structures
Cron job scheduling with crontab; automated ETL pipelines and backup scripts

title: Programming Essentials in C++ (CPA)
highlights: C++ syntax, data types, control flow, functions, and memory management
Object-oriented programming: classes, inheritance, polymorphism, and encapsulation
Standard C++ library usage and language-specific problem solving
CPA (C++ Certified Associate Programmer) exam preparation

title: Applying Data Structures to Manipulate Cleansed UN Data
highlights: Core data structures: arrays, stacks, queues, linked lists, and hash tables
Java Collections Framework implementation and industry-standard practices
Real-world data manipulation: processing and transforming UN dataset records
Algorithmic selection based on use-case optimization and performance trade-offs
